Concrete Calculator (Cubic Yards)

Calculate how many cubic yards of concrete you need for your project. Enter dimensions for slabs, footings, or columns.

FAQ

How do I calculate cubic yards of concrete?

Cubic yards = (Length ft × Width ft × Depth ft) / 27. There are 27 cubic feet in one cubic yard.

How much does a yard of concrete cost?

Concrete typically costs $120-$150 per cubic yard for ready-mix delivery, varying by location and type.

Should I order extra concrete?

Yes, order 5-10% extra to account for waste, spillage, and uneven subgrade. It's better to have slightly too much than too little.
